title: Thailand Non-Immigrant Visa (B) Application — For Employment
description: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs' (MFA) two-page visa application specimen served under its Non-Immigrant Visa (B) for Employment publishing path, opening Thailand's Visa vertical (2 of 6; Taxes opened via th/rd/pit-90-personal-income-tax-return). Page 1 is a non-fillable checklist naming the required supporting documents for this visa category and purpose (modelled as documents[] below, not fields[]); page 2 is the MFA's own generic 'APPLICATION FOR VISA' AcroForm (footer-stamped 'mfavisaform 10 09 2007'), used across all MFA/Royal Thai Embassy and Consulate-General visa categories, with a 'Please Indicate Type of Visa Requested' selector rather than a form dedicated solely to Non-Immigrant Visa (B). This v1.0.0 models every applicant-facing field on page 2's live AcroForm: the visa-type-requested and title selectors, full identity/travel-document/occupation/address fields, the local-guarantor and guarantor-in-Thailand blocks, the minor-children-if-accompanying block, travel/entry details, and the purpose-of-visit selector, plus the date fields accompanying the form's two printed declarations. Two of the 58 AcroForm widgets (Text4, Text13) are excluded as non-visible, near-zero-dimension artifact fields with no corresponding printed label — disclosed in VERIFICATION.md. The lower 'FOR OFFICIAL USE' block (Application/Reference No., Visa No., consulate-assigned Type of Visa/Category/Entries/Fee/dates, Documents Submitted) carries no AcroForm widgets at all and is out of scope, consistent with this registry's convention for consulate/caseworker-only sections. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Thailand or the Ministry of Foreign Affairs.

authority.name: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Kingdom of Thailand

source.documentRef: NON-IMMIGRANT VISA (B) FOR EMPLOYMENT — checklist + APPLICATION FOR VISA (page 2 footer-stamped "mfavisaform 10 09 2007")

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2602, a pre-scouted candidate identified in GOV-2593's cycle. Opens Thailand's Visa vertical (2 of 6; Taxes already open via th/rd/pit-90-personal-income-tax-return, GOV-2593). Independently re-fetched https://image.mfa.go.th/mfa/0/3fsjzRYZ2e/VISA_FORM/NON-IMMIGRANT_VISA_(B)_FOR_EMPLOYMENT_-_To_be_employed_in_Thailand-new.pdf this cycle (not trusting the prior cycle's citation): HTTP 200, application/pdf, 270,415 bytes, sha256 8e61fcc80bd6260f83f86b01d5443f54a75eda4ef915c3c5449e498b8b2600d4. Re-ran pdfjs-dist (legacy build, getAnnotations({intent:'display'}) filtered to subtype==='Widget'): confirmed 2 pages, 58 AcroForm widgets total (0 on page 1, 58 on page 2) — matching the pre-scouted count exactly. Every widget's rect was correlated against getTextContent()'s position-sorted text (grouped by rounded y, sorted by x) to identify its printed label before modelling, per this registry's established coordinate-correlation technique; 2 of the 58 widgets (Text4, Text13) are near-zero-dimension artifacts (1pt and 0pt wide respectively) with no adjacent printed label and are excluded from fields[], disclosed here and in VERIFICATION.md. Deliberately scoped to model only page 2's applicant-facing AcroForm plus page 1's checklist (as documents[]); the page-2 'FOR OFFICIAL USE' block and its printed (but widget-less) consulate fields are out of scope since no AcroForm mechanism exists for them.

fields.name: visaTypeDiplomatic
fields.label: Diplomatic Visa
fields.description: One of six mutually-exclusive 'Type of Visa Requested' options printed at the top of the application (see exclusivityGroups). This document is served under the MFA's Non-Immigrant Visa (B) for Employment publishing path, so an applicant using this specimen for that purpose is expected to select visaTypeNonImmigrant rather than this option; the field itself is modelled as printed since the underlying AcroForm is the MFA's shared, all-purpose visa application (not a Non-Immigrant-B-only form) and imposes no such constraint mechanically.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, "Please Indicate Type of Visa Requested" box: "Diplomatic Visa" (Check Box3)

fields.name: visaTypeOfficial
fields.label: Official Visa
fields.description: See visaTypeDiplomatic for the mutual-exclusivity and shared-form disclosure.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, "Please Indicate Type of Visa Requested" box: "Official Visa" (Check Box6)

fields.name: visaTypeCourtesy
fields.label: Courtesy Visa
fields.description: See visaTypeDiplomatic for the mutual-exclusivity and shared-form disclosure.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, "Please Indicate Type of Visa Requested" box: "Courtesy Visa" (Check Box5)

fields.name: visaTypeNonImmigrant
fields.label: Non-Immigrant Visa
fields.description: The option expected to be checked for this document's Non-Immigrant Visa (B) for Employment purpose. See visaTypeDiplomatic for the mutual-exclusivity and shared-form disclosure.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, "Please Indicate Type of Visa Requested" box: "Non-Immigrant Visa" (Check Box4)

fields.name: visaTypeTourist
fields.label: Tourist Visa
fields.description: See visaTypeDiplomatic for the mutual-exclusivity and shared-form disclosure.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, "Please Indicate Type of Visa Requested" box: "Tourist Visa" (Check Box7)

fields.name: visaTypeTransit
fields.label: Transit Visa
fields.description: See visaTypeDiplomatic for the mutual-exclusivity and shared-form disclosure.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, "Please Indicate Type of Visa Requested" box: "Transit Visa" (Check Box2)

fields.name: numberOfEntriesRequested
fields.label: Number of Entries Requested
fields.description: A handwritten blank ('Number of Entries Requested _____') printed beside the visa-type selector, with no corresponding AcroForm widget in the source PDF — modelled here for completeness of the printed form's data points, but not backed by a fillable field; disclosed in VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: titleMr
fields.label: Mr.
fields.description: One of three mutually-exclusive title checkboxes preceding the applicant's name (see exclusivityGroups).

fields.name: titleMrs
fields.label: Mrs.
fields.description: See titleMr for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: titleMiss
fields.label: Miss
fields.description: See titleMr for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: fullName
fields.label: First Name Middle Name Family Name (in BLOCK letters)
fields.description: The applicant's full name in block letters, e.g. "SOMCHAI MANEE JAIDEE".
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, row beside the title checkboxes (Text1)

fields.name: formerName
fields.label: Former Name (if any)
fields.description: A prior legal name the applicant has held, if any.

fields.name: nationality
fields.label: Nationality
fields.description: The applicant's current nationality, e.g. "Malaysian".

fields.name: nationalityAtBirth
fields.label: Nationality at Birth
fields.description: The nationality the applicant held at birth, if different from the current nationality (printed as its own blank distinct from nationality above).

fields.name: countriesTravelDocumentValid
fields.label: Countries for which travel document is valid
fields.description: The countries/territories the applicant's travel document is valid for, e.g. "All countries".

fields.name: birthPlace
fields.label: Birth Place
fields.description: The applicant's city/country of birth, e.g. "Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia".

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: Marital Status
fields.description: The applicant's marital status as a free-text blank, e.g. "Single" — printed as a blank line, not as selectable checkboxes.

fields.name: proposedAddressInThailandLine1
fields.label: Proposed Address in Thailand
fields.description: The address the applicant intends to reside at in Thailand (line 1 of 3 blank lines provided).

fields.name: proposedAddressInThailandLine2
fields.label: Proposed Address in Thailand (continued)
fields.description: Second of 3 blank lines for the proposed address in Thailand.

fields.name: proposedAddressInThailandLine3
fields.label: Proposed Address in Thailand (continued)
fields.description: Third of 3 blank lines for the proposed address in Thailand.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of Birth
fields.description: The applicant's date of birth.

fields.name: localGuarantorNameAddressLine1
fields.label: Name and Address of Local Guarantor
fields.description: The name and address of the applicant's local (home-country) guarantor (line 1 of 2 blank lines provided).

fields.name: localGuarantorNameAddressLine2
fields.label: Name and Address of Local Guarantor (continued)
fields.description: Second of 2 blank lines for the local guarantor's name and address.

fields.name: localGuarantorTel
fields.label: Tel./Fax. (Local Guarantor)
fields.description: The local guarantor's telephone/fax number.

fields.name: travelDocumentType
fields.label: Type of Travel Document
fields.description: The type of travel document presented, e.g. "Ordinary Passport".

fields.name: guarantorInThailandNameAddressLine1
fields.label: Name and Address of Guarantor in Thailand
fields.description: The name and address of the applicant's guarantor in Thailand — for this visa's Employment purpose, typically the sponsoring employer (line 1 of 2 blank lines provided).

fields.name: guarantorInThailandNameAddressLine2
fields.label: Name and Address of Guarantor in Thailand (continued)
fields.description: Second of 2 blank lines for the name and address of the guarantor in Thailand.

fields.name: guarantorInThailandTel
fields.label: Tel./Fax. (Guarantor in Thailand)
fields.description: The Thailand-based guarantor's telephone/fax number.

fields.name: travelDocumentNo
fields.label: No. (Travel Document)
fields.description: The travel document's number.

fields.name: travelDocumentIssuedAt
fields.label: Issued at
fields.description: The place the travel document was issued.

fields.name: travelDocumentDateOfIssue
fields.label: Date of Issue (Travel Document)
fields.description: The travel document's date of issue.

fields.name: travelDocumentExpiryDate
fields.label: Expiry Date (Travel Document)
fields.description: The travel document's expiry date.

fields.name: occupationPosition
fields.label: Occupation (present position)
fields.description: The applicant's present position/job title, per the label's instruction to "specify present position and name of employer" across the 2 blank lines provided (line 1).

fields.name: occupationEmployer
fields.label: Occupation (name of employer)
fields.description: The applicant's employer, per the label's instruction to "specify present position and name of employer" across the 2 blank lines provided (line 2).

fields.name: currentAddressLine1
fields.label: Current Address
fields.description: The applicant's current address (line 1 of 2 blank lines provided).

fields.name: currentAddressLine2
fields.label: Current Address (continued)
fields.description: Second of 2 blank lines for the applicant's current address.

fields.name: currentAddressTel
fields.label: Tel. (Current Address)
fields.description: A contact telephone number for the applicant's current address.

fields.name: currentAddressEmail
fields.label: E-mail (Current Address)
fields.description: An e-mail address for the applicant.

fields.name: permanentAddressLine1
fields.label: Permanent Address (if different from above)
fields.description: The applicant's permanent address, only if different from the current address above (line 1 of 3 blank lines provided). No selector field distinguishes whether this block applies; left fully optional, per this registry's established convention for the same class of printed 'if different/if applicable' block with no dedicated gating widget.

fields.name: permanentAddressLine2
fields.label: Permanent Address (continued)
fields.description: Second of 3 blank lines for the permanent address.

fields.name: permanentAddressLine3
fields.label: Permanent Address (continued)
fields.description: Third of 3 blank lines for the permanent address.

fields.name: permanentAddressTel
fields.label: Tel. (Permanent Address)
fields.description: A contact telephone number for the applicant's permanent address, if provided.

fields.name: minorChildrenInfoLine1
fields.label: Names, dates and places of birth of minor children (if accompanying)
fields.description: Names, dates, and places of birth of any minor children accompanying the applicant (line 1 of 2 blank lines provided). Optional: only applies when minor children are accompanying.

fields.name: minorChildrenInfoLine2
fields.label: Names, dates and places of birth of minor children (continued)
fields.description: Second of 2 blank lines for accompanying minor children's information.

fields.name: dateOfArrivalInThailand
fields.label: Date of Arrival in Thailand
fields.description: The applicant's planned date of arrival in Thailand.

fields.name: travelingBy
fields.label: Traveling by
fields.description: The applicant's mode of travel into Thailand, e.g. "Air".

fields.name: flightOrVesselName
fields.label: Flight No. or Vessel's name
fields.description: The flight number or vessel name the applicant will arrive on.

fields.name: durationOfProposedStay
fields.label: Duration of Proposed Stay
fields.description: The applicant's proposed duration of stay in Thailand, e.g. "90 days".

fields.name: dateOfPreviousVisitToThailand
fields.label: Date of Previous Visit to Thailand
fields.description: The date of the applicant's most recent previous visit to Thailand, if any.

fields.name: purposeOfVisitTourism
fields.label: Purpose of Visit: Tourism
fields.description: One of five mutually-exclusive 'Purpose of Visit' options (see exclusivityGroups). None of the five printed options is literally worded 'Employment'; for this visa's Employment purpose, purposeOfVisitBusiness is the closest applicable printed option, disclosed here rather than asserted as canonical.

fields.name: purposeOfVisitTransit
fields.label: Purpose of Visit: Transit
fields.description: See purposeOfVisitTourism for the mutual-exclusivity and Employment-purpose disclosure.

fields.name: purposeOfVisitBusiness
fields.label: Purpose of Visit: Business
fields.description: The closest printed option to this document's Employment purpose (see purposeOfVisitTourism). See purposeOfVisitTourism for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: purposeOfVisitDiplomaticOfficial
fields.label: Purpose of Visit: Diplomatic/Official
fields.description: See purposeOfVisitTourism for the mutual-exclusivity and Employment-purpose disclosure.

fields.name: purposeOfVisitOther
fields.label: Purpose of Visit: Other
fields.description: See purposeOfVisitTourism for the mutual-exclusivity note. When selected, purposeOfVisitOtherDescription should be completed.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, "Purpose of Visit:" row: "Other (please specify)" (Check Box13)

fields.name: purposeOfVisitOtherDescription
fields.label: Other (please specify)
fields.description: Free-text description of the visit's purpose, required only when purposeOfVisitOther is checked.

fields.name: refundDeclarationDate
fields.label: Date (Refund Declaration)
fields.description: The date accompanying the applicant's signature on the printed declaration "I hereby declare that I will not request any refund from my paid visa fee even if my application has been declined." (No separate fillable Signature widget exists in the source; the signature itself is a wet-ink line with no AcroForm mechanism, consistent with this registry's convention for such lines.)

fields.name: touristTransitDeclarationDate
fields.label: Date (Tourist/Transit Declaration)
fields.description: The date accompanying the applicant's signature on the printed declaration under "Attention for Tourist and Transit Visas Applicants" ("I hereby declare that the purpose of my visit to Thailand is for pleasure or transit only..."). Required only for Tourist/Transit applicants; left optional here since this document's Employment purpose does not fall under that attention block. No separate fillable Signature widget exists, consistent with refundDeclarationDate.

documents.label: Completed visa application form
documents.handling: This document (page 2, modelled as fields[] above) printed and signed.
documents.sourceRef: Page 1 checklist, item 1: "Completed visa application form"

documents.label: Original passport with at least 6-month validity and 2 blank visa pages
A passport size photo (white/blue background, taken within the past 6 months)
Work-authorization evidence: a copy of an existing Thai work permit (if applicable), OR a Ministry of Labour approval letter / Form W.P. 3 (m.vi. 3), OR a Board of Investment of Thailand letter
documents.handling: The source lists three alternative sub-items (5.1-5.3) under a single 'Any of the followings' instruction, without a discrete selector distinguishing which one applies; modelled as one required document per this registry's convention for disclosed either/or evidence requirements.
documents.sourceRef: Page 1 checklist, item 5 ("Any of the followings"): 5.1-5.3

documents.label: A copy of the company's registration/business license
A copy of the company's list of shareholders
A copy of the company's latest balance sheet
A copy of the company's value-added tax (VAT) registration
